---
title: Academic Curriculum Vitæ
date: 2026-02-26
published-title: "CV last updated:"
engine: knitr
freeze: false
resources: 
  - https://nbviewer.org/github/brueckmann/brueckmann.github.io/blob/main/CV_GBrueckmann.pdf
---



```{=html}
<div><p class="text-center">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg cv-download" href="https://github.com/brueckmann/brueckmann.github.io/blob/main/docs/CV_GBrueckmann.pdf?raw=True" target="_blank">
<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf-fill"></i>&ensp;Download CV
</a>
</p>
<iframe src="https://nbviewer.org/github/brueckmann/brueckmann.github.io/blob/main/CV_GBrueckmann.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="800" style="border: 1px solid #ccc;"></iframe>
<br>
</div>
<p></p>
```
